verse_text: The giants born there, those renowned from the beginning, being very large in size and skilled in war,

links.context: The ancient giants are mentioned in [[GEN.6:4]]; WSol 14:6; [[BAR.3:26]]; and 3Mc 2:4. They are described as expert men of war, arrogant, insolent, foolish, mighty, and trusting in their own strength. They were destroyed by God in the flood.
